provider: California Data Exchange Center / California Department of Water Resources

station.timezone: local station time as returned by CDEC; QueryF page labels current view PDT

interpretation: This is the first reproducible CDEC CBR event-window pull for South Fork modern flow/stage source review.
The window includes a July 5 pulse near the current median-runnable planning band and lower overnight values, making it useful for time-varying release/low-flow review.
CDEC -9999 values are retained as raw values, normalized to null, and excluded from summary statistics.
Before promotion, record CDEC terms, flag meanings, station-to-reach relation, release schedule context, and guide/outfitter validation.
promotion_gate: Do not update South Fork low/median/high presets or photoreal water appearance from this window alone; use it as reproducible modern-flow evidence for the next reviewed flow-band calibration pass.
